name: tflex-harness-api
description: Unified Codex plugin for tflex-harness and T-FLEX CAD 17 API docs workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run tflex-harness and research T-FLEX API docs.
interface.longDescription: Unified plugin that bundles tflex-harness CAD automation guidance, T-FLEX CAD 17 API documentation research guidance, and the tflex-harness MCP server. Install tflex-harness first and run bootstrap so the MCP server can discover local repo/API paths from environment.
defaultPrompt: Search T-FLEX API docs for this member.
Run a compile-only T-FLEX C# snippet.
Use tflex-harness to create CAD evidence.
